Authors and Citation

Authors

  • Nicolas Frerebeau. Author, maintainer.
    Université Bordeaux Montaigne

  • Brice Lebrun. Contributor.
    Université Bordeaux Montaigne

  • Matthew Peeples. Contributor.
    Arizona State University

  • Ben Marwick. Contributor.
    University of Washington

  • Anne Philippe. Contributor.
    Université de Nantes

  • Jean-Baptiste Fourvel. Contributor.
    CNRS

Citation

Source: inst/CITATION

Frerebeau, Nicolas (2019). tabula: An R Package for Analysis, Seriation, and Visualization of Archaeological Count Data. Journal of Open Source Software, 4(44), 1821. DOI 10.21105/joss.01821.

@Article{,
  title = {{tabula}: An R Package for Analysis, Seriation, and Visualization of Archaeological Count Data},
  author = {Nicolas Frerebeau},
  year = {2019},
  journal = {Journal of Open Source Software},
  volume = {4},
  number = {44},
  page = {1821},
  doi = {10.21105/joss.01821},
}

On this page

tabula is a part of the tesselle project, a collection of packages for research and teaching in archaeology. Learn more at tesselle.org.

Developed by Nicolas Frerebeau.

Site built with pkgdown 2.0.6.9000.
